    Alle Klassen und Schnittstellen|Alle Packages|Serialisierte Form

    G

    generateSQL() - Statische Methode in Klasse de.drvbund.lernlabit.lb.javaproject.Test
    Generates SQL INSERT statements for train trips.
    getAllSegment() - Methode in Klasse de.drvbund.lernlabit.lb.javaproject.dataAccess.TrackSegmentDAO
    Retrieves all track segments from the database.
    getAllStations() - Methode in Klasse de.drvbund.lernlabit.lb.javaproject.dataAccess.StationDAO
    Retrieves all stations from the database.
    getAngle() - Methode in Klasse de.drvbund.lernlabit.lb.javaproject.model.RotatableIconLabel
    Gets the current rotation angle of the icon.
    getArrivalTime() - Methode in Klasse de.drvbund.lernlabit.lb.javaproject.model.AnimatedTrain
    Gets the scheduled arrival time at the current segment's end station.
    getArrivalTime() - Methode in Klasse de.drvbund.lernlabit.lb.javaproject.model.RoutePart
    Gets the scheduled arrival time.
    getCategory() - Methode in Klasse de.drvbund.lernlabit.lb.javaproject.model.TrainType
    Gets the category classification.
    getConnection() - Methode in Klasse de.drvbund.lernlabit.lb.javaproject.controller.DatabaseManager
    Returns the active database connection.
    getCurrentlyRunningTrips(Map) - Methode in Klasse de.drvbund.lernlabit.lb.javaproject.dataAccess.TripDAO
    Retrieves all trains currently running at the current simulation time.
    getCurrentPosition() - Methode in Klasse de.drvbund.lernlabit.lb.javaproject.model.AnimatedTrain
    Calculates the train's current position on the map.
    getDepartureTime() - Methode in Klasse de.drvbund.lernlabit.lb.javaproject.model.AnimatedTrain
    Gets the scheduled departure time from the current segment's start station.
    getDepartureTime() - Methode in Klasse de.drvbund.lernlabit.lb.javaproject.model.RoutePart
    Gets the scheduled departure time.
    getDescription() - Methode in Klasse de.drvbund.lernlabit.lb.javaproject.model.TrainType
    Gets the descriptive name of the train type.
    getEndStation() - Methode in Klasse de.drvbund.lernlabit.lb.javaproject.model.AnimatedTrain
    Gets the current segment's ending station.
    getEndTime() - Methode in Klasse de.drvbund.lernlabit.lb.javaproject.model.RouteOption
    Gets the arrival time of the last segment.
    getFinalStationId() - Methode in Klasse de.drvbund.lernlabit.lb.javaproject.model.AnimatedTrain
    Gets the ID of the train's final destination station.
    getFormattedDuration() - Methode in Klasse de.drvbund.lernlabit.lb.javaproject.model.RouteOption
    Calculates and formats the total journey duration.
    getFromStationId() - Methode in Klasse de.drvbund.lernlabit.lb.javaproject.model.RoutePart
    Gets the departure station ID.
    getId() - Methode in Klasse de.drvbund.lernlabit.lb.javaproject.model.Station
    Gets the station's unique identifier.
    getId() - Methode in Klasse de.drvbund.lernlabit.lb.javaproject.model.TrackSegment
    Gets the segment's unique identifier.
    getId() - Methode in Klasse de.drvbund.lernlabit.lb.javaproject.model.Train
    Gets the train's unique identifier.
    getId() - Methode in Klasse de.drvbund.lernlabit.lb.javaproject.model.TrainType
    Gets the train type's unique identifier.
    getInstance() - Statische Methode in Klasse de.drvbund.lernlabit.lb.javaproject.controller.DatabaseManager
    Returns the singleton instance of DatabaseManager.
    getInstance() - Statische Methode in Klasse de.drvbund.lernlabit.lb.javaproject.controller.SimulationController
    Returns the singleton instance of SimulationController.
    getIsIceAllowed() - Methode in Klasse de.drvbund.lernlabit.lb.javaproject.model.TrackSegment
    Checks whether ICE trains are allowed on this segment.
    getName() - Methode in Klasse de.drvbund.lernlabit.lb.javaproject.model.AnimatedTrain
    Gets the train's display name.
    getName() - Methode in Klasse de.drvbund.lernlabit.lb.javaproject.model.Station
    Gets the station's display name.
    getName() - Methode in Klasse de.drvbund.lernlabit.lb.javaproject.model.Train
    Gets the train's display name.
    getParts() - Methode in Klasse de.drvbund.lernlabit.lb.javaproject.model.RouteOption
    Gets all route parts in this option.
    getPreferredSize() - Methode in Klasse de.drvbund.lernlabit.lb.javaproject.view.MapPanel
    Calculates the preferred size for the map panel based on station coordinates.
    getPrice() - Methode in Klasse de.drvbund.lernlabit.lb.javaproject.model.RoutePart
    Gets the price for this segment.
    getPriceFactor() - Methode in Klasse de.drvbund.lernlabit.lb.javaproject.model.TrackSegment
    Gets the price factor for this segment.
    getPriceFactor() - Methode in Klasse de.drvbund.lernlabit.lb.javaproject.model.TrainType
    Gets the price factor for this train type.
    getProgress() - Methode in Klasse de.drvbund.lernlabit.lb.javaproject.model.AnimatedTrain
    Calculates the train's progress along the current segment.
    getRoute_name() - Methode in Klasse de.drvbund.lernlabit.lb.javaproject.model.RoutePart
    Gets the route/line name.
    getSeatCount() - Methode in Klasse de.drvbund.lernlabit.lb.javaproject.model.TrainType
    Gets the maximum seating capacity.
    getSpeedFactor() - Methode in Klasse de.drvbund.lernlabit.lb.javaproject.controller.SimulationController
    Returns the current speed factor as an integer.
    getSpeedFactor() - Methode in Klasse de.drvbund.lernlabit.lb.javaproject.model.TrainType
    Gets the speed factor for this train type.
    getStartStation() - Methode in Klasse de.drvbund.lernlabit.lb.javaproject.model.AnimatedTrain
    Gets the current segment's starting station.
    getStartTime() - Methode in Klasse de.drvbund.lernlabit.lb.javaproject.model.RouteOption
    Gets the departure time of the first segment.
    getStationAID() - Methode in Klasse de.drvbund.lernlabit.lb.javaproject.model.TrackSegment
    Gets the ID of the first connected station.
    getStationBID() - Methode in Klasse de.drvbund.lernlabit.lb.javaproject.model.TrackSegment
    Gets the ID of the second connected station.
    getStationPath(List) - Methode in Klasse de.drvbund.lernlabit.lb.javaproject.model.RouteOption
    Generates a formatted string showing the complete station path.
    getToStationId() - Methode in Klasse de.drvbund.lernlabit.lb.javaproject.model.RoutePart
    Gets the arrival station ID.
    getTotalPrice() - Methode in Klasse de.drvbund.lernlabit.lb.javaproject.model.RouteOption
    Calculates the total price for this route option.
    getTrain_name() - Methode in Klasse de.drvbund.lernlabit.lb.javaproject.model.RoutePart
    Gets the train name.
    getTransfer_time_min() - Methode in Klasse de.drvbund.lernlabit.lb.javaproject.model.Station
    Gets the minimum transfer time at this station.
    getTransferCount() - Methode in Klasse de.drvbund.lernlabit.lb.javaproject.model.RouteOption
    Counts the number of train transfers required for this journey.
    getType() - Methode in Klasse de.drvbund.lernlabit.lb.javaproject.model.Train
    Gets the train's type classification.
    getVirtualTime() - Methode in Klasse de.drvbund.lernlabit.lb.javaproject.controller.SimulationController
    Returns the current virtual time in the simulation.
    getX_coordinate() - Methode in Klasse de.drvbund.lernlabit.lb.javaproject.model.Station
    Gets the X coordinate for map visualization.
    getY_coordinate() - Methode in Klasse de.drvbund.lernlabit.lb.javaproject.model.Station
    Gets the Y coordinate for map visualization.
